description: Perform a spatial analysis to identify cities located near international borders. Using the loaded country layer and the populated places layer located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp, identify all populated places within 0.5 degrees of any country border. Export the resulting selection of cities to a new shapefile at /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/border_cities.shp.
